title: Example paper title

quintuple.backgrounds: data augmentation is an effective solution to data scarcity in low-resource scenarios. however token-level tasks such as ner suffer token-label misalignment
quintuple.ideas: We propose ELM: Data Augmentation with Masked Entity Language Modeling for Low-Resource NER
quintuple.concise_methods: Mask entities and use language model to predict augmented entities while preserving token-label alignment
references: Contextual Augmentation: Data Augmentation by Words with Paradigmatic Relations
